PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Mark Marincik.

Mr. Schneider presented a letter from the attorney who drafted the decedent's will, confirming that she executed it in his presence. He also provided additional documentation with the decedent's signature, includingher California ID and Mark Marincik's birth certificate. Mark Marincik stated that he had lived with his mother for his entire lifetime and was familiar with her signature, confirming that it was her signature on the will. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). February 4, 2019 was set for status hearing re closing of the estate.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)
